mapper.select: SELECT no,title,writer,content,hit,regdate FROM BOARD ORDER BY 1 DESC
mapper.update: update board set hit=hit+1 where no=#{no}
mapper.select: SELECT no,title,writer,hit,content,reip,regdate FROM BOARD WHERE no=#{no}
select count(*) as cnt from board where no=#{no} AND pwd=#{pwd}
mapper.update: update board set title=#{title}, writer=#{writer}, content=#{content}, pwd=#{pwd}, reip=#{reip}, regdate=sysdate where no=#{no}
